rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to the commissioner's general rulemaking authority to administer this education subchapter. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner may adopt rules as necessary to administer this subchapter.
_note: Rule text concerns education subchapter rulemaking authority; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No nexus between the two.
